text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking through the shopping
district...

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text: WHOOOAAAYAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Her heartfelt songs will bring life to this shopping
district! Well, what do you think of the plan?!

text_block_list.name: Fishmonger
text_block_list.text:
What do I think of it? Uhhh... It'll be too loud and
distracting. I'm sorry, but having concerts in the
shopping district might not be a good idea.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Ugh, what the heck! If you don't get my sound,
then I don't even wanna play here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wham!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Phew! Glad I caught you in time. Sorry for
grabbing your arm so suddenly.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Good. You'll have to forgive her, though. She
tends to lose sight of her surroundings when she's
mad.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
My bad. It's just, we can't find a venue for my
concert...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
This gal here's ready to go big! She's moving off
the streets and onto her first stage performance!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I can vouch for her exceeding musical talent! I
first heard her sing in front of the station, and I
was moved to my core!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You're the only one who really gets my
genius, Pearl.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! One day, the world will realize it too. Now
come on, let's keep looking for your stage!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of which... You wouldn't happen to
know a place we can hold a performance, would
you?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text: Wooooo! Waaarrrghhh! THANK YOU!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
And there you have it! Didn't that just kickstart
your heart?

text_block_list.name: Cafe Owner
text_block_list.text:
U-um... Sorry, but her music doesn't really fit the
cafe's atmosphere...
choice_data_list: Let's find somewhere that's a bit livelier, then.

text_block_list.name: Manager
text_block_list.text:
Sorry, but we've got a young and hip clientele
here, so... Oh, I know! Can you perform disco?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text: Tch! Does it look like I can?!
choice_data_list:
L-let's look for somewhere more musically
aligned with your style!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
This place is quite relaxing, but what do you say
to livening it up with some rock music?

text_block_list.name: Store Manager
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... To be honest, I'm not really feeling it.
Why not just perform at a club if you're doing
rock?

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text: UUUGH!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
This sucks! We're getting turned down left and
right! My music's just too sophisticated for any of
them to understand!
choice_data_list: Now, now. No need to get all worked up.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You're right. There's only one way to make it big nowadays anyway—and that's to go viral!

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, get this. A band I like, Santa Monica,
started off by making a name for themselves
online too!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Huh... I guess there is that method.

text_block_list.name: Girl with Guitar
text_block_list.text:
All right! Since we're doing this, let's make a
music video that'll really pop off! C'mon, let's go
see which of the studios we know will let us use
their gear!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There she goes, off to twist someone else's arm. I
just hope she can get her passion across
properly...

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I think she's on a roll!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
Yep! She's the type to make staggering gains in
the face of adversity. She's tackling a chance for
growth head-on!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
She may be frustrated at how poorly today went,
but I bet this experience will spark inspiration for
her songwriting! ♪
choice_data_list: When you put it that way, it makes sense.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
But in order for her to keep fighting, she'll need a
strong support system.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
As determined and passionate as she is, she'll
eventually break if she's constantly buffeted by
opposing winds.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
She needs a friend to catch her when she's about
to fall. We all do, right?

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
I decided to be that pillar of support from the
moment her singing stole my heart.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: And I learned a lot today too.

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry! Things will definitely
work out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeking the Pearl makes her declaration with full
confidence, and I can't help but be impressed by
her conviction.
